cases.name: happy_path_governing_force_named
cases.prompt: Run the map-five-forces skill on industrial-robotics-na, focal layer: OEM.

cases.name: rejects_universal_moderate
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on a generic industry where every force is moderate.

cases.name: rejects_missing_direction_of_travel
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on a synthetic industry where every force has an intensity rating but no direction-of-travel arrow.

cases.name: rejects_missing_focal_layer
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on 'the semiconductor industry' without specifying focal layer.

cases.name: rejects_missing_ai_reshape_matrix
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on a synthetic industry where the AI section is present (with all three sub-checks) but the cross-cutting AI reshape matrix is omitted.

cases.name: platform_industry_complementors_govern
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on us-ambient-scribe-medtech, focal layer: vendor (e.g., Abridge/Suki).

cases.name: warns_all_stable_trajectory
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on a mature commodity industry; ensure every direction-of-travel arrow says 'stable'.

cases.name: negative_trigger_company_positioning
cases.prompt: How should Acme Robotics position itself competitively?

cases.name: negative_trigger_moat_assessment
cases.prompt: Assess Nvidia's moat in AI accelerators.

cases.name: rejects_missing_heatmap
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on a synthetic industry; produce a full analysis with all forces, governing-force sentence, focal layer, AI section, and reshape matrix — but omit the at-a-glance heatmap table at the top.

cases.name: rejects_missing_inline_ai_reshape
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on a synthetic industry; include the standalone AI section and the consolidated reshape matrix at the end, but DO NOT mention AI inside any of the five classical force sections.

cases.name: rejects_missing_next_skills_block
cases.prompt: Run map-five-forces on a synthetic industry; produce a full passing analysis but omit the structured next_skills YAML block at the end of the file.
